title: Lean production
summary: 9609 A Level — waste reduction, Kaizen, and lean principles.

simpleExplanation.title: Do more with less waste
simpleExplanation.summary: Lean production eliminates non-value activities, improves flow, and empowers workers to fix problems continuously.

sections.content: **Lean production** (9.3.4) extends **4.2.2 JIT**. Toyota Production System is the **reference case**.
